Table of Contents

Enum esriMapServerMsgCodeEnum

Namespace
ESRI.ArcGIS.Carto
Assembly
ESRI.Server.Carto.dll

MapServer Logging Messages.

[Guid("7C5D6E78-49FD-4F40-892F-8DBD2D4BB44F")]
public enum esriMapServerMsgCodeEnum

Fields

esriMapServerMsgCode_CacheOnDemandMissing = 10824

10824: CacheOnDemand property not found.

esriMapServerMsgCode_CanNotCacheOnDemandAndIgnoreCache = 10831

10831: Cannot Cache on Demand and Ignore Cahce.

esriMapServerMsgCode_CanNotCacheOnDemandIfDisconnected = 10830

10830: Cannot Cache on Demand if disconnected.

esriMapServerMsgCode_CanNotConnectToCache = 10834

10834: Unable to connect to the Cache.

esriMapServerMsgCode_CanNotIgnorecacheIfDisconnected = 10829

10829: Cannot Ignore Cache if disconnected.

esriMapServerMsgCode_CapabilityUnsupported = 10804

10804: Capability Unsupported.

esriMapServerMsgCode_ClientCachingAllowedMissing = 10826

10826: ClientCachingAllowed property not found.

esriMapServerMsgCode_CloudStore = 10855

10855: Messages related to Cloud Store.

esriMapServerMsgCode_DateFieldsTimeZone = 10852

10852: User specified time zone for time fields.

esriMapServerMsgCode_DebugMessage = 10850

10850: MapServer Debug Message.

esriMapServerMsgCode_DefaultSymbolGenerated = 10843

10843: Default symbol generated.

esriMapServerMsgCode_DisconnectedFromData = 10806

10806: Operation can not be performed while disconnected from data.

esriMapServerMsgCode_DynamicDataSourceError = 10848

10848: Dynamic Data Source Error.

esriMapServerMsgCode_ErrorInCreatingTimeZone = 10851

10851: Error in creating timezone from user specified timezone.

esriMapServerMsgCode_FieldNotFound = 10839

10839: Field not Found.

esriMapServerMsgCode_FileInvalid = 10808

10808: File is invalid.

esriMapServerMsgCode_FileOpenFailed = 10816

10816: Cannot open file. Properble cause: The file is inaccessible to the Server.

esriMapServerMsgCode_FileReadableByArcReaderOnly = 10809

10809: File only readable by ArcReader Application.

esriMapServerMsgCode_FormatNotSupported = 10840

10840: Format not Supported.

esriMapServerMsgCode_GeneralGeoDatabaseError = 10837

10837: General GeoDatabase error.

esriMapServerMsgCode_IgnoreCacheMissing = 10825

10825: IgnoreCache property not found.

esriMapServerMsgCode_ImageGenerationFailed = 10841

10841: Image generation failed.

esriMapServerMsgCode_ImageGeneration_End = 10099

10099: Writing image to disk for method has completed.

esriMapServerMsgCode_ImageGeneration_Started = 10098

10098: Writing Image to disk for method has started.

esriMapServerMsgCode_InvalidEmbeddedFont = 10847

10847: Invalid embedded font encountered.

esriMapServerMsgCode_InvalidLicense = 10802

10802: MapServer failed to start due to invalid license

esriMapServerMsgCode_InvalidWhereClauseOrDefinitionExpression = 10849

10849: The input where clause or definition expression is not valid.

esriMapServerMsgCode_InvisibleOrInvalidFieldInSubField = 10805

10805: Invalid or invisible field in QueryFilter SubField.

esriMapServerMsgCode_IsCacheMissing = 10823

10823: IsCached property not found.

esriMapServerMsgCode_LackingServerAdminPrevileges = 10833

10833: Does not have Server Object administration privileges.

esriMapServerMsgCode_LayerDrawingDescriptionNotValid = 10846

10846: LayerDrawingDescription is not valid.

esriMapServerMsgCode_LayerIDNotFound = 10838

10838: LayerID not Found.

10821: Output Directory Access Denied.

esriMapServerMsgCode_OutputDirectoryNotFound = 10820

10820: Output Directory not found.

10814: Document can not be opened.

esriMapServerMsgCode_PMFFileHasTimeOut = 10812

10812: File has timed out.

esriMapServerMsgCode_PMFFilePasswordProtexted = 10811

10811: File is password protected and cannot be used for a server

esriMapServerMsgCode_PMFGlobeEmbedded = 10815

10815: File contains a Globe, and can not be opened by MapServer

10817: Invalid File Type.

esriMapServerMsgCode_PMFReadMapError = 10813

10813: Unable to read the specified document

esriMapServerMsgCode_PMFUnknownError = 10818

10818: Unknown Error.

esriMapServerMsgCode_PMFUnservableReason = 10810

10810: This PMF cannot be served because the following functionality in it has been disabled:

esriMapServerMsgCode_PhysicalOutputDirectoryNotAccessible = 10853

10853: Physical output directory is not accessible.

esriMapServerMsgCode_PhysicalOutputDirectoryNotReachable = 10854

10854: Physical output directory is not reachable.

esriMapServerMsgCode_Preparation_End = 10095

10095: Prepartion for method has completed.

esriMapServerMsgCode_Preparation_Start = 10094

10094: Prepartion for method has started.

esriMapServerMsgCode_PropertyFilePathUndefined = 10822

10822: Property FilePath is not defined.

esriMapServerMsgCode_QueryOperation_End = 10097

10097: Query operation for method has completed.

esriMapServerMsgCode_QueryOperation_Start = 10096

10096: Query operation for method has started.

esriMapServerMsgCode_SecureLayersEmbedded = 10807

10807: The document contains secure (password-protected) layers.

esriMapServerMsgCode_SymbologyNotConverted = 10845

10845: Layer symbology is not converted.

esriMapServerMsgCode_TableHasNoOIDHenceQueryFailed = 10842

10842: Table has no ObjectID field, hence Query Failed.

esriMapServerMsgCode_TooManyDomains = 10844

10844: Too many domains in the fields.

esriMapServerMsgCode_UnsupportedRequest = 10803

10803: Unsupported Request.

esriMapServerMsgCode_WMSNeedsOutputDirectory = 10835

10835: WMS needs output directory.
